results.title: Senate confirms Michael Martin to serve on federal bench in Detroit
results.description: WASHINGTON — The U.S. Senate on Wednesday confirmed veteran federal prosecutor Michael Martin to serve on the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Michigan in a bipartisan 62-36 vote. Ten Democratic senators and one independent voted with the...

results.title: House votes for Department of War renaming as part of an annual defense bill
results.description: The House has passed a defense policy bill that incorporates President Donald Trump’s request for a historic $1.15 trillion in spending for the Pentagon. The bill passed Wednesday also would designate the Department of Defense as the Department of War...
